content:
## Finding Alpha in Middle Market Real Estate

Brandon Sedloff sits down with Collin Laffey, who leads U.S. real estate efforts at LFPI, to unpack how one of the most active allocators in private markets evaluates managers, structures long-duration capital, and identifies opportunity across real estate funds and co-investments.

## Why Private Capital Is Waking Up to Net Lease

Jonathan Pong joins Brandon Sedloff to discuss the evolution of Realty Income from one of the original net lease REITs into a global real estate platform spanning public and private capital markets.

## From Outputs to Outcomes with AI

Juniper Square's Brandon Rembe explains why private fund managers must rebuild their operating models around agentic AI—and how to take the first step without overwhelming the firm.

## Global Real Estate Investing Through Uncertainty

Live from INREV in Barcelona: Brandon Sedloff sits with top institutional allocators to unpack how real estate is evolving in private markets and how they're positioning for the next cycle.

## From Real Estate to Healthcare: Building Enduring Businesses

Brandon Sedloff sits down with Fernando De Leon to unpack the evolution of Leon Capital Group and the lessons learned from building and operating businesses across healthcare, insurance, financial services, and real estate.

## How GPs Should Approach AI Right Now

Brandon Rembe shares how rapidly advancing technology is forcing firms to rethink not just their tools, but how they operate, make decisions, and deliver results to LPs.
